sentences.english: I play video games for about one hour every day after finishing my homework.
sentences.korean: 매일 숙제를 끝낸 후 약 1시간 비디오 게임을 해요.

sentences.english: My favorite game is a racing game where I can drive fast cars.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 게임은 빠른 차를 운전할 수 있는 레이싱 게임이에요.

sentences.english: Sometimes I play online with my friends from school.
sentences.korean: 가끔 학교 친구들과 온라인으로 같이 해요.

sentences.english: My parents say one hour is enough and I agree.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
